use_cases: Display global user distribution across geographic regions
Show office or facility locations with metrics on a rotatable 3D globe
Visualize data points like transactions or events on an interactive world map
Create an engaging dashboard element for SaaS analytics platforms
Represent network infrastructure or server locations worldwide
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe component built with COBE that displays geographic markers showing locations with user counts or metrics. Supports drag-to-rotate interaction, automatic parallax rotation when idle, and click-to-expand functionality for viewing marker details. Ideal for SaaS dashboards showcasing global user distribution, fintech platforms displaying transaction locations, or any application requiring a visually engaging way to present worldwide data points.
